Australian Telecommunications Vendors

Below is an index of Australian telecommunications vendors and global providers with an Australian presence. We provide positive, factual summaries of their typical capabilities. If you are reviewing your current provider or exploring alternatives, we can help you compare options—without negative commentary about any vendor.

Vendors (A–Z)

Telstra Optus TPG Telecom Vocus (Vocus Group) Aussie Broadband

More vendor pages can be added over time. Contact us for an independent review of your telecommunications and to compare alternatives.
